falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 10% resistance level defined by the bottom_2024_aug pattern
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this threshold would indicate a bullish reversal, contradicting the current HOLD signal and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.
A blowoff score above 60 would confirm extreme market pressure, directly contradicting the current HOLD and proving the UNKNOWN verdict incorrect.

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern similarity drops below 60% to bottom_2024_aug
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant divergence from the historical pattern would invalidate the basis for the current UNKNOWN verdict, proving the call incorrect.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
